title: !SOLID Sweatshirt — Black
image_captions: Black crewneck sweatshirt with white outlined text reading [KOBENHAVN] on the chest. Small black tag at bottom right reads ISOLID.
Black crewneck sweatshirt with white outlined text reading [KOBENHAVN] on the chest. Small black tag at bottom right reads ISOLID.
Back view showing black sweatshirt with ribbed cuffs. Neck tag reading !SOLID You are not born Solid it's something you become.
Neck tag reading !SOLID. Back view showing black [KØBENHAVN] graphic print.
Neck tag reading !SOLID Size L. Small size tag showing 'L'.
Neck tag reading !SOLID Size M. Name: SDKBH Crew SW Style: 21107450. Made in Bangladesh.
Care label showing 80% Cotton / 40% Polyester. Neck tag reading Clevercare info with 'P' symbols.
Vertical tape measure showing 70cm at hem edge. Back view of black hoodie with 'ISOL' logo on upper right back.
Horizontal tape measure showing 59cm at the garment's edge.
enhanced_description:
!SOLID !SOLID Crew Sweatshirt — Black
Brand: !SOLID
Size: L
Condition: Like New
Composition: 80% Cotton / 20% Polyester
Color: Black

Measurements (Laid Flat):
Pit-to-Pit: 59cm
Length: 70cm

About the Piece
Elevate your streetwear game with this sleek black crewneck from !SOLID. Featuring bold white outlined "KOBENHAVN" lettering on the chest and a distinctive "ISOL" logo detail on the upper back, this piece captures the essence of Copenhagen's urban aesthetic. The soft cotton-poly blend ensures comfort for all-day wear while maintaining a sharp silhouette.

Style Note: Minimalist Streetwear / Copenhagen Chic

Key Detail
The garment features a ribbed crew neck and cuffs, with a small black tag at the bottom right reading "ISOLID" on the front. Inside, the main neck tag displays the full brand philosophy: "!SOLID You are not born Solid it's something you become."

Seller Notes
Shipping: 🚀 Next day shipping guaranteed!

Shop My Closet: Check out my other offers for more !SOLID items—I'm happy to offer bundle discounts if you see something else you like!

Questions? Drop a comment or send an offer. I'm responsive and ready to ship.
